description: Rule with the per-axis boundary_policy form and ghost_width (RFC §5.2.8 / §7, esm-bet). Exercises the panel_dispatch kind on cubed-sphere axes plus a non-zero ghost_width. The rule engine itself does not branch on either field — bindings preserve them across parse/serialize and apply the replacement unconditionally — so the rewrite output here is a straightforward index-substitution. The fixture's purpose is to confirm every binding parses both new authorial forms (per-axis boundary_policy with panel_dispatch interior/boundary parameters; per-axis ghost_width object) without error and rewrites the rule normally.
